main.description: Every vocabulary record whose declared `world` matches (`closed-with-default`, `open`, or `hierarchy-closed`).

output.description: Paged<EnvelopedEntry<R>> — identical shape to the REST endpoint for this query.

cursor.description: Opaque pagination cursor returned by a prior page of results.

limit.description: Maximum number of entries to return in one page.

description: XRPC facade for the `vocabularies_with_world` catalog query. Mirrors the REST endpoint at `/v1/vocabularies/by-world`; both paths invoke the same handler.
